description: Composition White crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck, print on the chest with a metallic tinge and a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments If music is your passion and your head turns in reflex to the sound of the strings and drums, then this t-shirt has been especially designed for you by lee. Look all 'metal' with the gold tinted print on the chest, while you feel perfectly at ease with the heat in the soft cotton. Pair it with rugged denims and a pair of sneakers for an ultimate glam look. *This product is developed using the unique multiple hand processes method. Slight peeling of the print post home laundry is absolutely normal, giving it a vintage look, and hence, should not be considered as a defect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
